  • Uses of ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.ConversionException in com.apigee.openapi.converter

    Description
    ConversionResult
    ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.convert(Path bundlePath)
    Converts an Apigee bundle to OpenAPI specification with default options.
    ConversionResult
    ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.convert(Path bundlePath, ConversionOptions options)
    Converts an Apigee bundle to OpenAPI specification with custom options.
    ConversionResult
    ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.convertAndSave(Path bundlePath, Path outputPath)
    Converts an Apigee bundle and saves the result to a file, inferring format from extension.
    ConversionResult
    ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.convertAndSave(Path bundlePath, Path outputPath, ConversionOptions options)
    Converts an Apigee bundle and saves the result to a file.
    String
    ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.convertToString(Path bundlePath, OpenApiWriter.OutputFormat format)
    Converts an Apigee bundle and returns the OpenAPI spec as a string.
    ApigeeBundle
    ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.parseBundle(Path bundlePath)
    Parses an Apigee bundle without generating OpenAPI spec.
    void
    ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.writeToFile(io.swagger.v3.oas.models.OpenAPI openAPI, Path path, OpenApiWriter.OutputFormat format)
    Writes an OpenAPI specification to a file.
    String
    ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.writeToString(io.swagger.v3.oas.models.OpenAPI openAPI, OpenApiWriter.OutputFormat format)
    Writes an OpenAPI specification to a string.
